subject: Is your district applying for the 2026 Digital Learning Grant?
previewText: The Digital Learning Grant closes April 6th. See how SchoolAI fits the requirements and book a quick demo.
module-4-0-0:
Hi {{ personalization_token('contact.firstname', 'fellow educator') }},

 

The 2026 Digital Learning Grant closes April 6th, and we want to make sure your district doesn't miss it. Districts can apply for up to $50,000 to bring AI-powered learning to their classrooms.

 

SchoolAI meets IDOE's vendor requirements and aligns to the grant's student outcome priorities. We built a short guide to walk you through the application. [Link to alignment doc]

 

If you have 20 minutes, we'd love to show you how other Indiana districts are using SchoolAI and help you put together a strong application. Schedule a call

 

The SchoolAI Team.
